nasb.text: For I have not dwelt in a house since the day I brought up the sons of Israel from Egypt, even to this day; but I have been moving about in a tent, even in a tabernacle.

esv.text: I have not lived in a house since the day I brought up the people of Israel from Egypt to this day, but I have been moving about in a tent for my dwelling.

cnv.text: 因為自從我把以色列人從埃及帶上來的那天起，直到今日，我都沒有住過殿宇。我一直都住在帳棚和會幕裡，到處漂泊。

ccb.text: 从我把以色列人带出埃及那天起，直到今天，我从未住过殿宇，一路上都住在帐篷里。
